templates.title: GENERATING
templates.ref: Awwwards SOTY patterns
templates.palette: near-black + acid lime; media = color
templates.whenToUse: A cinematic showreel where the work was AI-generated: scroll-snap full-screen beats, each showing the prompt then the result denoising in.
templates.signature: Each image resolves from noise with a lime render scan-line; prompt as architectural-scale type; query-reticle cursor.

templates.title: ORBIT (v3)
templates.ref: Messenger, Bruno Simon
templates.palette: near-black + spectrum
templates.whenToUse: A landing where a hero 3D object (your real .glb) floats in a particle-lit WebGL space, then scrolls into a gallery below.
templates.signature: Three.js textured model + spectrum particle field + bloom + mouse-parallax, gated to the hero for performance.

templates.title: BENTO (v2)
templates.ref: 2026 bento editorial
templates.palette: near-black + spectrum-per-modality
templates.whenToUse: A scannable multi-asset gallery with varied tile sizes, the developing-frame reveal, and a standby rail.
templates.signature: Broken-grid bento with per-modality accent hues and a developing-photo reveal on scroll.

templates.title: PLAYHEAD
templates.ref: Unseen Studio 2025 Wrapped, OceanX
templates.palette: two-color near-black #070707 + gold #E4B504
templates.whenToUse: A sequenced set of full-bleed media (year-in-review, generation timeline, portfolio progression) you scrub left-to-right like a video playhead.
templates.signature: A fixed gold scrubber turns vertical wheel into eased horizontal travel; the visitor IS the playhead, with a NN/NN HUD and stroked chapter indices.

templates.title: QUERY
templates.ref: Obys Agency, Unseen Studio
templates.palette: two-color near-black + electric cyan; media supplies color
templates.whenToUse: A reel/portfolio that reads like prompting a model: a minimal monochrome typographic index you query with the cursor (rows reveal their asset on hover, click to lock).
templates.signature: Cursor-driven floating reveal that lags with velocity tilt and a trailing cyan shadow; non-queried rows dim.

templates.title: THE VERMILLION PRESS
templates.ref: Obys typography, Resn
templates.palette: editorial LIGHT: bone #efe9dd + ink + vermilion #e2452b
templates.whenToUse: An editorial/art-journal landing with giant variable serif sharing the canvas with one big asset per spread; a light-mode contrast to dark templates.
templates.signature: Oversized Fraunces variable type whose weight deforms to scroll rhythm; type overlaps media via exclusion blend.

templates.title: PROVENANCE
templates.ref: Shopify Winter '26 Renaissance Edition
templates.palette: warm chiaroscuro: umber #221a12, bone #e9dcc4, gold #c9a35b
templates.whenToUse: Present finished AI media to a client as a reverent old-master museum exhibition, giving each output art-historical weight.
templates.signature: Each work in a gilt frame with a spotlight pool and aged varnish; an engraved museum placard reveals on a slow intersection.

templates.title: SPACE (Mood Wall)
templates.ref: Codrops 3D gallery, Active Theory
templates.palette: near-black + mood-color per asset
templates.whenToUse: An immersive showreel where you fly the camera through floating framed works in 3D Z-space, advancing on scroll.
templates.signature: Framed media planes in depth with reflective floor; scroll advances the fly-through; clean 2D fallback on mobile.

templates.title: STDOUT
templates.ref: dev-tool / data-brutalism
templates.palette: two-color near-black + phosphor lime
templates.whenToUse: A developer/CLI-native audience: frame the work as a beautiful control-room where each render prints to stdout beneath the exact command that produced it.
templates.signature: $ commands with real flags + a live stats strip; the output prints below the command. Monospace throughout.

templates.title: MORPH
templates.ref: Active Theory
templates.palette: two-color near-black + one accent; media inside the type
templates.whenToUse: A type-as-interface studio hero where giant words morph and react, with the media revealed inside/behind the letterforms.
templates.signature: Huge variable letters react to scroll and cursor; media shows through the type. (Best seen live; kinetic.)

templates.title: ARC
templates.ref: Lando Norris (OFF+BRAND), End Speciesism
templates.palette: one bold accent + chromatic arc cold->warm->hot
templates.whenToUse: Tell a progression story (raw to refined, draft to final) where the page color temperature heats up cold to warm to hot as you scroll.
templates.signature: Full-bleed beats whose palette shifts cold-warm-hot as a felt narrative ladder; headline-scale type.

templates.title: SPOTLIGHT NOIR
templates.ref: Lusion, noir cinema
templates.palette: two-tone near-black + warm tungsten
templates.whenToUse: A gallery felt as discovery: work hidden in a black stage, revealed only where the viewer's cursor light falls; click to lock and bloom.
templates.signature: A warm tungsten spotlight (GPU-composited shade) follows the cursor; only the lit work reads; the locked piece blooms to full clarity.

templates.title: FILM STRIP
templates.ref: cinema editing timelines
templates.palette: near-black + amber, monospace
templates.whenToUse: A cinematic reel where each asset is a frame on a literal 35mm strip you scrub left-to-right like a cutting-room timeline.
templates.signature: Sprocket-holed celluloid strip with Kodak edge codes + 24fps timecode HUD; the centered frame enlarges and plays.

templates.title: LIQUID
templates.ref: Codrops liquid distortion, Active Theory
templates.palette: near-black + mint; media supplies color
templates.whenToUse: A studio/agency hero where 3-6 full-bleed works ARE the navigation and the liquid morph between them is the brand identity.
templates.signature: A WebGL displacement shader ripples the work toward the pointer and morph-dissolves between pieces; clean CSS crossfade on mobile.

templates.title: RASTER WERK
templates.ref: International Typographic Style, Bauhaus
templates.palette: bone #f0ece1 + ink + vermillion #e2231a
templates.whenToUse: A disciplined print-grade poster series or asset index on a hard 12-col grid with oversized numerals and one accent color.
templates.signature: Difference-blend stamped index numerals anchoring flat primary-color plates on a strict modular grid with registration marks.

templates.title: DEPTH
templates.ref: parallax scroll storytelling
templates.palette: near-black + mood gradient per scene
templates.whenToUse: A reel where each piece sits in real dimensional layers - the room moves with scroll and pointer for a floating, diorama feel.
templates.signature: Foreground, midground, work, and background move at different rates so works float in dimensional space; pure CSS transforms.

templates.title: CUT & PASTE
templates.ref: risograph zines, punk flyers
templates.palette: newsprint + risograph blue/pink duotone
templates.whenToUse: Present AI works as a raw hand-pasted photocopied zine (torn paper, tape, halftone, marker) instead of clean editorial gloss; scrolling flips the issue.
templates.signature: Washi-tape scroll-progress strip; torn-paper, tape-pinned cut-outs paste down on scroll with a folio page counter.

templates.title: CHROME COVER FLOW
templates.ref: Apple Cover Flow
templates.palette: near-black chrome + cyan accent
templates.whenToUse: Show a curated reel one cinematic hero at a time with 3D depth; drag, scroll, or arrows flip through angled cards with a reflection.
templates.signature: Pure-CSS preserve-3d cover flow: flat-forward centered card with a reflection, side cards fanned on the Y-axis with depth-of-field blur.

templates.title: ISSUE
templates.ref: Vogue / Wired / Kinfolk covers
templates.palette: bone + ink + per-issue accent
templates.whenToUse: A work archive where every piece deserves its own newsstand cover - masthead, cover lines, barcode, full-bleed hero; snap-scroll flips the issue.
templates.signature: Oversized Fraunces masthead bled across the top + floating cover-line kickers + a per-issue accent + a seeded SVG barcode.

templates.title: DRAFTING TABLE
templates.ref: engineering schematics / drafting
templates.palette: blueprint navy + cyan hairline + bone
templates.whenToUse: A precise technical portfolio or index where each piece is framed and dimensioned like an engineering drawing, hairlines drawing on scroll.
templates.signature: Hairline SVG draws itself (stroke-dashoffset) framing and dimensioning each work like a part on a blueprint, with spec callouts.

templates.title: SIGNAL DECAY
templates.ref: datamosh, VHS, cyberpunk
templates.palette: near-black + RGB split (cyan/magenta) + scanline
templates.whenToUse: An edgy digital-decay reel where works arrive and depart via datamosh: RGB split, scanline tear, block displacement, I-frame smear.
templates.signature: RGB channel split + scanline + block displacement + I-frame smear on each transition with a persistent VHS shimmer; reduced-motion = clean cuts.

templates.title: DIPTYCH
templates.ref: End Speciesism, before/after sliders
templates.palette: two-tone near-black + coral seam
templates.whenToUse: Show a clear quality jump between two versions of the same subject (local vs hosted, draft vs final); the side-by-side comparison carries the narrative.
templates.signature: A sticky RAW/REFINED split where the glowing accent seam auto-sweeps on scroll and is pointer-draggable for hand comparison; oversized labels.

templates.title: ATELIER CANVAS
templates.ref: Figma, tldraw, Milanote
templates.palette: near-black dot-grid + orange + yellow stickies
templates.whenToUse: Present a body of work as an explorable spatial workspace (mood board) you pan and zoom, rather than a scrolling page.
templates.signature: A transform-layer pan/zoom board with works pinned spatially, curved connector wires, sticky notes, a live minimap, and cluster-zoom pills.

templates.title: RING CAROUSEL
templates.ref: 3D cylinder carousels (gallery in the round)
templates.palette: near-black + warm amber
templates.whenToUse: Orbit a small set of works around a rotating CSS-3D cylinder spun by drag, scroll, or keys, where only the front panel plays.
templates.signature: A slowly rotating CSS-3D cylinder: the front panel sharp + amber-lit + the only one decoding/playing, neighbors curving away in perspective.

templates.title: ONE KEY (Manifesto)
templates.ref: The Pudding, editorial longform
templates.palette: warm bone + ink + vermilion
templates.whenToUse: A reading-first manifesto/long-read where each work is an inline captioned figure that masks in as you reach it; the opposite of a flashy reel.
templates.signature: A centered Newsreader reading column with a vermilion drop-cap, margin footnotes, oversized pull-quotes, and a folio that renames per movement.

templates.title: BOOT
templates.ref: retro OS boot, BIOS/loader aesthetics
templates.palette: near-black + phosphor green, scanlines
templates.whenToUse: An animated boot sequence where a BIOS-style screen loads each asset, then the work fills the screen with a CRT power-on flash.
templates.signature: BIOS init lines + a progress bar load each asset, then a CRT power-on flash; scanlines + screen-curvature vignette; rhythmic module-by-module.

templates.title: GOLDEN HOUR
templates.ref: context-reactive / time-aware theming 2026
templates.palette: five real-clock bands: pre-dawn indigo, sunrise amber, midday bone, golden-hour vermilion, night navy
templates.whenToUse: A portfolio whose ambient mood should track the visitor's real local time of day while the works themselves stay constant.
templates.signature: A fixed living sky (gradient + sun + stars + horizon) and every card's cast-shadow angle driven by the visitor's real clock, with a draggable corner clock-face that scrubs any hour; pure CSS variables, no WebGL.

templates.title: THE PROVENANCE FILES
templates.archetype: FOIA redacted dossier, hover to declassify
templates.ref: FOIA document leaks, declassified-file aesthetic
templates.palette: manila #d8cdb4 over near-black, stamp red #a01b14 / blue #1f3a63, declassified green #2f8f3e
templates.whenToUse: A showcase that frames each work as a classified exhibit you declassify, doubling as a clean provenance-transparency story.
templates.signature: Hover, click or tap a black redaction bar to wipe it away with a clip-path dissolve and flash a green DECLASSIFIED stamp, tracked by a live redactions-remaining counter and a DECLASSIFY ENTIRE FILE button.

templates.title: CONSTELLATION
templates.archetype: works as nodes in a navigable star-map
templates.ref: Fauna Robotics spatial UI, node-graph star maps
templates.palette: near-black #050810 + ice blue #a8d4f5
templates.whenToUse: Present a body of work as an explorable star-field where each work is a glowing node and constellation lines group themes.
templates.signature: Pan and zoom a dark star-field of glowing work-nodes joined by constellation lines; hover a node for its prompt + thumbnail, click to lock and dim the rest; Canvas 2D, touch pan/pinch on mobile.

templates.title: FOLDWORK
templates.ref: Exat Typeface, KOKUYO (CSSDA 2025)
templates.palette: bone #f0ece3 + deep cobalt #1d2c6b
templates.whenToUse: A case-study reel where each work creases and folds away like paper to reveal the next; tactile editorial papercraft, no WebGL.
templates.signature: Scroll-driven pure-CSS 3D diagonal fold: the upper triangle of each sheet rotates back around a corner hinge, a crease shadow tracing the fold and a cobalt paper underside revealing the next work.

templates.title: HALFTONE
templates.ref: Niccolo Fanton dithering shader (Codrops 2025), Game-Boy / e-ink
templates.palette: paper #e8e4d8 + ink #1a1a1a (the dither is the color system)
templates.whenToUse: An anti-AI-polish reel where every image and video is rendered live as a 1-bit ordered-dither grid; hover and click reveal the source.
templates.signature: A live WebGL Bayer-dither shader renders all media as a dense 1-bit pixel grid that brightens on cursor proximity and dissolves to full color on click; a Bayer-LUT texture keeps it GPU-robust.

templates.title: GENOPS CONSOLE
templates.ref: Vercel / Observable / Linear dark data-viz
templates.palette: near-black green #080a09 + lime #c2f53e; cyan/amber/rose status; JetBrains Mono + Inter
templates.whenToUse: Present a media-gen reel to a technical or ops-minded audience as a live control surface: event ticker, latency/cost/throughput cards, fleet gauges, and a jobs table.
templates.signature: An expandable jobs table where clicking a row slides open a drawer that plays that job's generated asset next to its prompt, pipeline, cost and seed.

templates.title: SCATTER TABLE
templates.ref: Palmer Studio draggable grid (2025), tldraw
templates.palette: bone #f2ede4 + ink #1a1814 + terracotta #c85a3c
templates.whenToUse: When a small curated set should feel like loose cards tossed on a table; the tactile drag-throw-and-pin interaction IS the gallery, no scroll.
templates.signature: Weighted drag-and-throw card physics with motion-direction tilt and soft wall bounces; click to pin a card full screen.

templates.title: BROADCAST TICKER
templates.ref: Bloomberg / Reuters terminal, broadcast lower-thirds
templates.palette: near-black #0a0a0a + broadcast amber #f4a000; monospace throughout
templates.whenToUse: Frame a media-gen gallery as a live trading floor: each render scrolls past as a clickable ticker slug that halts the tape and pulls a full quote card.
templates.signature: A continuous cursor-driven amber broadcast tape (push right to fast-forward, left to rewind, pure CSS) with a counter-running context-tag strip and a CRT scanline veil.

templates.title: ELASTIC RIBBON
templates.ref: Codrops easeReverse 2025; Jeton scroll-morph (Awwwards)
templates.palette: cream #f5efe0 + ink #16130d + vermilion #d8482a
templates.whenToUse: A small curated body of work (4 to 9 pieces) where the navigation itself is the hook: one tensioned cord the visitor drags and snaps through, no buttons or grid.
templates.signature: A single vermilion elastic cord runs the spine with polaroids pinned on alternating sides; dragging bows and tensions the cord, releasing snaps to the next work, with a live tension read-out.

templates.title: MORPHGRID
templates.ref: Dropbox Brand (CSSDA 2025), Codrops staggered grids
templates.palette: bone #f3efe8 + ink #111 + terracotta #b8402a; Fraunces serif
templates.whenToUse: When one continuous set of pieces should recompose itself between editorial framings (packed mosaic, single column, strip, radial fan) as the viewer scrolls.
templates.signature: A single set of cells physically reflows between four named formations (mosaic, editorial, strip, octagonal radial fan) driven purely by scroll position in one rAF loop, no animation library.

templates.title: INTERFACE NOSTALGIA OS
templates.ref: Milosz Chudy portfolio, Player Zero AI desktop UI
templates.palette: Win95 silver #c0c0c0 + navy #000080 title bars + teal #008080 desktop
templates.whenToUse: A mixed-media showcase where the interface itself is the wow: browsing means rummaging through draggable, minimisable, overlapping retro-OS app windows.
templates.signature: A Win95 desktop as a portfolio: each work is a draggable, minimisable, overlapping skeuomorphic app window with a taskbar button, a Start menu, and a right-click Cascade/Arrange menu.

templates.title: HOLODECK
templates.ref: holographic foil cards, FVCKRENDER iridescence, Bebas Neue Y3K
templates.palette: void purple #06000a + iridescent conic foil (magenta #ff2d78, cyan, violet, gold) + pale ink #f4ecff
templates.whenToUse: Showcase a small set of hero works (3-12) as collectible holographic foil cards with cursor/tilt shimmer and a lens-flare wipe between them.
templates.signature: A Y3K holographic trading-card display case: a hero work on a pure-CSS conic-gradient foil bezel whose hue rotates via @property and shifts with cursor delta (desktop) or device tilt (mobile).

templates.title: LIQUID GLASS DEPTH
templates.ref: Apple Liquid Glass WWDC 2026; Exo Ape Fluid Glass (CSS Design Awards 2026)
templates.palette: near-black #0d0d0f under a drifting gradient + ice-white translucent tint; blur and tint are the color system, no solid fills
templates.whenToUse: A small set of premium portfolio or product cards presented as depth-layered floating glass over rich media, where translucency, frosted blur and scroll parallax sell genuine spatial hierarchy.
templates.signature: Per-tier backdrop-filter blur (far 8px / mid 16px / near 26px) IS the depth system; hover clears a pane's frost toward zero and slides it forward, capped at 3 concurrent blurred panes for GPU budget.

templates.title: PASTED
templates.ref: Jackie Hu / KidCore collage 2026; Toilet Paper Barcelona
templates.palette: cream #f4f0e0 + washi red #d62828 + mustard #e3a72f + teal #2a6f6b
templates.whenToUse: A warm, hand-made, maximalist showcase where each work should feel physically taped onto a page rather than dropped into a clean grid.
templates.signature: Works look physically pasted down: torn-paper CSS clip-path edges held at a tilt by washi-tape strips, and hovering a card lifts it, straightens its rotation as if unsticking the tape, and deepens the shadow.

templates.title: PRESSURE
templates.ref: Obys Agency kinetic type 2026; AVA SRG variable type
templates.palette: off-white #f8f8f5 + ink #111; zero decorative colour, hierarchy from ink opacity
templates.whenToUse: A typography-only index or portfolio where the text itself is the navigation: no imagery in the frame, kinetic variable-font weight reacts to cursor and scroll velocity, works open full-screen on demand.
templates.signature: One variable font (Roboto Flex) does everything: cursor speed pumps the weight axis hairline-to-black and scroll velocity stretches the width axis, so the live type is the only interface.

templates.title: CONTROL ROOM
templates.ref: NGR.EV surveillance aesthetic (2026), security-UI posters
templates.palette: monitor-black + phosphor green #39ff14, lone red REC dot; colour from the feeds
templates.whenToUse: Present a small set (5 to 9) of image or video feeds as a live analogue security-monitor wall when you want a high-impact surveillance aesthetic.
templates.signature: An uneven 2+3+2 bank of CCTV tubes with VHS timestamps, scanlines and a shared single-rAF grain canvas; clicking a monitor maximises it with a CRT power-on zoom while the rest dim to grainy thumbnails.

templates.title: AXIS SHIFT
templates.ref: Nikola Radeski portfolio (2026), Igloo.inc
templates.palette: warm paper #f5f0e8 + ink #1c1815 + vermilion #c0392b; Fraunces + Space Grotesk
templates.whenToUse: A works index where vertical scroll pivots 90 degrees into a horizontal scroll-snap lane of full-bleed landscape stills and short loops.
templates.signature: A vermilion CSS-only 3D perspective tilt that visibly turns the floor 90 degrees as vertical scroll hands off to a native horizontal scroll-snap lane (no scroll hijacking).

templates.title: THE LONG READ
templates.ref: Adidas Annual Report sidebar (2026), SBS The Boat
templates.palette: deep navy #1a1a2e + chapter gold #e8c547 + paper ink; Fraunces + Spectral + Space Mono
templates.whenToUse: A long-form editorial case study where each work appears as inline evidence inside argued prose, with a persistent chapter index to jump around.
templates.signature: A position:sticky left rail of numbered chapter dots each ringed by a reading-progress arc (collapsing to a floating bottom dot-nav on phones), with a distinct CSS scroll-reveal per chapter and works set inline as evidence.

templates.title: BIOLUMINESCENT MESH
templates.ref: Microsoft.ai vegetal shaders (2026), Ylem.art
templates.palette: abyss black #030a12 + bioluminescent teal #00f5a0 + deep violet #8a2be2
templates.whenToUse: A portfolio or studio gallery where dark frosted media cards float over a living deep-sea aurora that breathes and ripples to the cursor.
templates.signature: A full-viewport GLSL fragment-shader mesh gradient that breathes via sine displacement + arithmetic value-noise fbm and ripples like disturbed water under the cursor; frosted-glass work cards float in the glow.

templates.title: STAMP DECK
templates.ref: Codrops Interactive Digital Stamp Collection (2026)
templates.palette: aged paper + postal ink + perforation gum + cancellation crimson
templates.whenToUse: Present works as collectible postage stamps in a philatelic catalogue, each with perforated edge, denomination and postmark, where hover magnifies through a loupe and click peels the stamp.
templates.signature: A cursor-following brass WebGL magnifying loupe (barrel distortion + edge chromatic aberration) over oversized perforated stamps, paired with a 3D corner-peel on click that curls the stamp back to expose the full-res piece.

templates.title: INK.RUN!
templates.ref: Ponpon Mania (Awwwards SOTM Oct 2025), Siena Film Foundation
templates.palette: panel paper #fefcf6 + ink #1a1a1a + spot red #e63946
templates.whenToUse: A generated-media or illustration portfolio that should read as a paced vertical manga/webtoon strip, each work a self-contained inked panel that breathes into view and taps open to a full splash.
templates.signature: Each work is an inked comic panel with a typewriter caption and a spot-red dialogue bubble; on scroll-in it breathes (CSS scale pulse) while a red speed-line sweeps once, only the centered video decodes, and tapping splashes it full-viewport with a perspective push.

templates.title: CREATIVE ATLAS
templates.ref: Codrops Scroll-Driven SVG Map Animations (2026), Floema Jewelry
templates.palette: cartographic navy #0f1923 + gold waypoints #c9a35b + parchment route #e8dcc4
templates.whenToUse: A 4 to 8 work portfolio narrated as a journey across a hand-drawn atlas, where each scroll step travels the route to the next golden waypoint that unfolds into a work.
templates.signature: A full-viewport hand-drawn inline-SVG atlas where scroll draws a gold-and-parchment route through golden waypoint markers, a vehicle dot riding the route tip, and the camera zooming into each marker as it unfolds the work into a paper dossier.

templates.title: UNFOLD GRID
templates.ref: Codrops Sticky Grid Scroll (2026), Dropbox Brand (CSSDA 2025)
templates.palette: bone #f3efe8 + ink + unlock-blue #2c6fad; Fraunces + Inter Tight + Space Mono
templates.whenToUse: A portfolio or gated drop where work sits locked (blurred, padlocked) and unlocks one cell at a time as the visitor scrolls, spiralling out from the center.
templates.signature: A sticky-pinned grid where scroll drives one CSS custom property that unlocks cells one by one spiralling from the center outward, each snapping from blurred/desaturated/padlocked to sharp full-color with a brief blue flash ring.

templates.title: MOOD METER
templates.ref: Codrops Scroll-Reactive Mood Backgrounds (2026), Terminal Industries REJOUICE
templates.palette: near-black void + velocity hue cyan to amber to magenta; near-white frosted slabs
templates.whenToUse: A clean vertical gallery where scroll speed itself is the interaction: slow keeps the palette icy and slabs crisp, fast turns the background hot and cards hazy, with a live ENERGY HUD.
templates.signature: A single rAF loop measures the per-frame derivative of scroll position and drives one CSS custom property that moves everything at once: ambient hue (cold to hot), per-card frost blur up to 16px, label weight, and a fixed ENERGY arc gauge.

templates.title: BLIND WIPE
templates.ref: Codrops SVG Mask Transitions on Scroll (2026), Cyd Stumpel (Awwwards SOTD 2025)
templates.palette: bone #f4f0e8 + mask black #111111 + vermilion seam #d8482a
templates.whenToUse: A portfolio or lookbook where each work should arrive with a tactile mask-reveal as it scrolls into view, the wipe itself being the brand.
templates.signature: Black SVG blind panels retract row-by-row to uncover each work while a vermilion seam stays lit along the retracting edge, cycling four wipe patterns; the first work is frozen mid-wipe at scroll=0 so the thumbnail shows the move.

templates.title: GLYPH FIELD
templates.ref: variable-font specimen microsites, kinetic-type foundries
templates.palette: near-black #0d0d0d + bone type #f0ece4; proximity ramp ice-blue #90c8f0 to deep-red #c0392b
templates.whenToUse: A typographic portfolio index where the whole first screen is a living variable-font specimen and works hide beneath the type, parted open by clicking a glyph cluster.
templates.signature: A dense grid of one repeated glyph where each cell's distance to the focal point (7 concentric rings) drives its weight axis (120 to 980) and hue, baking a cursor-shaped pressure depression into the type; one rAF loop, no WebGL.

templates.title: NEVER-ENDING PARALLAX
templates.ref: Codrops The Never Ending Story (2026), Infinite Parallax Grid
templates.palette: deep void #06060a + ember #ff6b35 (loop indicator) + off-white ink
templates.whenToUse: A portfolio that should feel boundless: works orbit forever across three parallax depth layers, the scroll never bottoms out, a corner LOOP counter the only sign it is circular.
templates.signature: One rAF loop advances a scalar; three depth layers (blurred bg, lit mid focus, sharp fg) render at per-layer factors and every panel wraps via positive-modulo so the last item silently teleports to the front, no duplicated DOM, no flash.

templates.title: SOUNDSCAPE REACTIVE
templates.ref: Codrops Audio-Reactive Web Audio API; CSS Design Awards visualizers
templates.palette: void #080808 + cyan bars #00e5ff + magenta peak caps #ff2d78
templates.whenToUse: A portfolio or showreel where each work carries its own sound signature and a frequency-bar column breathes with audio (per-card loop, synth, or live mic), one focused work locked and playing.
templates.signature: Per-card real-time Canvas equalizer driven by a Web Audio AnalyserNode (FFT 2048, smoothing 0.85, no WebGL): cyan bars with a magenta peak cap riding the loudest band, alive and varied at scroll=0 via a suspended-safe ambient oscillator bank.

templates.title: TUMBLE REEL
templates.ref: Codrops Exploring 3D Image Rotations on Scroll (2026), Lusion
templates.palette: near-black #0c0c0c + bone matte #f0ece4; works are the only color
templates.whenToUse: A portfolio or capsule-drop where each work should tumble through a 3D wave path on scroll and rest flat and sharp at center, a tactile pure-CSS 3D feel without WebGL.
templates.signature: Each work translates on Y, rotates on X and Z, and scales down a sine-wave Z-depth path, snapping to a flat sharp rest at viewport center before tumbling out; per-card easing makes no two alike, with a hero stack of three tumbling cards framed at scroll=0.

templates.title: INFINITE IMAGE TUBE
templates.ref: Codrops Reactive Depth 3D Image Tube (2026), Lusion Three.js inertia
templates.palette: void black #050505 + lime chrome #c8f53e; images supply all interior color
templates.whenToUse: Present a body of work wrapped on the outer face of an endlessly spinning WebGL cylinder where scroll or drag adds spin, inertia carries it, and only the front-facing plane is fully sharp.
templates.signature: Real image planes placed by trig on a 3D cylinder's outer face, the front plane sharp and lime-lit while side planes curve away into shader perspective blur; scroll/drag injects rotational velocity and inertia dampens it, the ring wrapping seamlessly at a full turn.

templates.title: ATELIER MORPH
templates.ref: Cyd Stumpel Portfolio (Awwwards SOTD 2025); CSS View Transitions API (Baseline 2025)
templates.palette: off-white #f5f1eb index + deep forest #1a3020 detail; Fraunces + Inter
templates.whenToUse: A portfolio or catalog of 6 to 12 works where clicking a card should morph that exact thumbnail straight into a full-bleed detail hero with no page-reload feel.
templates.signature: The native CSS View Transitions API morphs the clicked thumbnail (size, position, pixels) into a full-bleed hero while the page color flips off-white to forest green like turning a card over; prev/next re-morph the same shared element.

templates.whenToUse: A portfolio or capsule drop where a floating CSS 3D cube acts as a synchronized second-screen, rotating to mirror the work shown in a full-bleed background gallery as you scroll.
templates.signature: A floating pure-CSS 3D cube (preserve-3d + perspective, no WebGL) tumbles multi-axis in exact sync with a scroll-driven full-bleed background crossfade, landing the matching work face forward each step.

templates.title: THE FAN REEL

templates.signature: A center deck of cards (the about-to-move rest signal at scroll=0) fans out on the first scroll tick, each card flying along its OWN pre-authored cubic-bezier SVG path (sampled via getPointAtLength, no library) into a locked asymmetric composition.

templates.title: LETTERBOX

templates.signature: Giant uppercase words rendered as CSS background-clip:text windows, each glyph an independent image tile whose background-position shifts on hover (desktop) or scroll (mobile) for letter-level parallax; nothing painted outside the letterforms.

templates.title: IRIS

templates.title: PAPER TRAIL

templates.palette: warm paper #f8f5f0 + ink #111 + per-work accent tints; faint dot grain

templates.signature: Six works, six distinct scroll entrances (fade, slide, rotate, iris, blur-focus-pull) plus a live reading-progress bar and per-work color that develops as each crosses the fold, all on animation-timeline:scroll()/view() with @property custom properties and ZERO JavaScript.

templates.title: LENTICULAR PRINT

templates.signature: A CSS preserve-3d tilt-to-flip card that swaps its finished-work front for its prompt-card back as the cursor sweeps across, with a gold lens-ridge shimmer raking the front and a resting pre-tilt so the lenticular mechanic reads before you touch it.

templates.title: BISECT

templates.signature: A cursor-tracked vermilion seam clip-paths two full content-rich worlds (dark studio vs light delivery) against each other in real time, with mirrored type that prints in the opposite world's ink so both headlines stay legible across the split.

templates.title: OFFSCREEN SUBSTRATE

templates.palette: void #0c0c0c + emergent ochre #8a6a3a / slate #4a5a6a / bone #d8ccbc noise; cards full color
templates.whenToUse: A portfolio or work-grid that needs a living procedural noise field behind floating cards that recolors to whatever card the visitor focuses, without stealing the main thread's frame budget.
templates.signature: A live arithmetic value-noise field painted in an OffscreenCanvas on a worker thread that drifts its whole hue toward the dominant color of whichever card you focus, then relaxes back to void.

templates.title: CURVED TYPE FESTIVAL

templates.whenToUse: A festival, event, or release poster series where display titles arc on organic SVG curves over full-bleed art and each line draws itself in on scroll.
templates.signature: Display titles set in Anton riding hand-drawn SVG textPath curves whose guide strokes draw themselves in via stroke-dashoffset as each poster scrolls into view; the curve flattens to a legible baseline on phones.

templates.title: FLUID X-RAY REVEAL
templates.ref: Codrops Dual-Scene Fluid X-Ray Reveal in Three.js (2026); Lusion

templates.signature: A half-resolution ping-pong fluid FBO accumulates the cursor trail and uses that organic density mask to dissolve each card's desaturated outer layer into its full-color inner, a teal membrane glowing at the fluid front; a seed blob shows the reveal at scroll=0 and the trail heals back to grey in about a second.

templates.title: CORRIDOR WALK

templates.signature: A first-person ink-sketch corridor (flat textured planes, no 3D models) receding to a vanishing point on sketchbook paper, the hero doorway already painted in full watercolor at scroll=0 and every other surface flooding from line drawing into color on hover; scroll walks forward, tilt leans the camera.

templates.title: ASCII REEL
templates.ref: ASCII canvas rasterizer (Codrops GLSL archive); CSS Design Awards generative-art 2026; Godly character-grid

templates.whenToUse: A portfolio or studio index where every image and video is rendered live as a phosphor-green ASCII character raster with cursor-driven density, click-to-reveal full color, and a live resolution control.
templates.signature: Each work is a live Canvas 2D character raster: the source is resampled to a tiny offscreen canvas (capped 200x200), each cell's luminance maps to a glyph painted in phosphor green; cursor proximity brightens and densifies cells, and clicking flips the work from character grid to the raw image via a scan-line wipe.

templates.title: BROKEN SET

templates.whenToUse: An editorial portfolio or index where the asymmetric broken-grid composition is fully populated at scroll=0 and the personality comes from cells that breathe and straighten under the cursor, no scroll animation.
templates.signature: Works hang on a deliberately un-level asymmetric CSS grid (irregular col/row spans, one oversized vermilion cell bleeding into the margin, a narrow dark numeral strip), each cell fixed at a tilt; hover or focus straightens that cell to level, scales it 1.04, and grows its shadow as if picked up while neighbors dim.

templates.title: MARGINALIA
templates.ref: CSS Anchor Positioning API (Baseline 2026); Popover API + @position-try
templates.palette: archival paper #f9f6f0 + ink #111 + amber callout #d4a84b
templates.whenToUse: A pure-typographic work index (title, date, medium, caption per row) where hovering or focusing a row tethers a full annotation panel into the right margin via native CSS anchor positioning, flipping below on phones.
templates.signature: Hovering or focusing a row in a bare typographic ledger tethers a rich annotation panel (letterboxed media, prompt, specs, process note) into the right margin via native anchor-name / position-anchor / anchor() / @position-try (zero JS decides placement); the first row is pinned open at scroll=0 with a live counter.

templates.title: MAGNET FIELD

templates.palette: near-black #0c0c10 + bone card faces #f0ece4 + slate-violet aura #7b68ee

templates.signature: Cursor magnetic attraction with inverse-square falloff plus a verlet spring snap-back, neighbor sympathy drift, and a slate capture aura that follows the pointer on a near-black work grid.

templates.title: LINEN LENS
templates.archetype: horizontal track + WebGL lens warp on center
templates.ref: Codrops Smooth Horizontal Parallax Gallery DOM-to-WebGL (2026); Three.js image-gallery scroll

templates.signature: A horizontal scroll track of plates on warm linen where only the centered plate swaps from flat DOM to a shared Three.js lens shader that warps the image toward the cursor (idle-seeded so the warp is alive at scroll=0), a per-image tint halo bleeding into the track edge.

templates.title: GRAVITY TRAIL

templates.palette: black void #0a0a0a + bone-white card backs + amber #e8c547 impact flash
templates.whenToUse: A playful index or landing where cursor movement physically rains real catalogue thumbnails that fall, bounce off a floor, and fade, the density of the cascade being the show.
templates.signature: Cursor-spawned thumbnail cards fall under gravity, bounce off a floor line with damped restitution, and fade, each floor impact blooming a small amber half-ring; a persistent resting fan sits on the floor at scroll=0.

templates.title: RIPPLE GRID

templates.signature: An expanding Canvas 2D wavefront ring rolls out from the click origin, unlocking each card (blur lifts, snaps to color) the instant it crosses; overlapping clicks fire multiple rings, a second click re-locks outward; one ring is seeded mid-expansion at scroll=0.

templates.title: TYPED IN

templates.signature: A vermilion blinking caret types each Newsreader-italic title char by char on warm monospace paper, then the thumbnail develops only once the last letter lands; cells start on IntersectionObserver, with one cell mid-type and one already typed at scroll=0.

templates.title: DEPTH-MAP TILT

templates.signature: On hover each card splits its image into per-pixel depth bands (from a grayscale depth map) and slides near layers in front of far ones opposite the tilt, in pure Canvas 2D with no WebGL; the hero card stands pre-tilted ~6deg at rest.

templates.title: NOISE PUSH

templates.title: RISO RUN

templates.title: DIAGONAL DRIFT

templates.title: PHOSPHOR QUEST

templates.title: SNAP SCORE

templates.signature: A vertical native scroll-snap track of 7 full-viewport rooms, each authoring a distinct CSS entrance fired exactly once on enter by one IntersectionObserver toggling animation-play-state (no rAF, no scroll-driven motion); the opening room is born settled and rooms 2-7 animate in.

templates.title: HAS RELATIONAL REVEAL

templates.title: LIVING GRID

templates.signature: A draggable vermilion handle sets the grid column count from 1 to 5, and each card self-reshapes its OWN internal layout via CSS @container queries (editorial spread, stacked card, compact thumbnail, image tile, hover-only sliver) with no JS deciding card internals.

templates.title: FILTER FORGE

templates.signature: Each work routes through its own NAMED inline SVG filter chain (feTurbulence to feDisplacementMap to feColorMatrix) with a distinct turbulence octave + seed so no two warp alike; SMIL animates baseFrequency for a constant emulsion shimmer, scroll velocity amplifies the melt.

templates.signature: An endless procedural ink Bezier ribbon drawn to a Canvas 2D layer over linen paper winds up through the viewport (control points breathing on a slow sine); work cards pin to the Catmull-Rom spline and rotate to its tangent, scroll advances a river-space offset so the current flows upward and new bends generate while old segments drop below.

templates.title: MORPH NAV

templates.signature: A single sticky SVG glyph morphs its d-attribute between five section icons (dot-constellation, triangle, cross, open-ring, grid) as you scroll the work index; at scroll=0 it is frozen mid-morph inside a vermilion active-state ring, same node count so only coordinates interpolate, no library.

templates.signature: A pixel-art studio room drawn entirely on a Canvas 2D diamond-tile iso grid from a tile-data JSON (no sprite sheets), where hovering or tapping an object (monitor, record player, bookshelf, plant) reveals its pinned work in a letterboxed CRT frame; the lamp casts a warm light cone at scroll=0.

templates.title: SCOPE CASCADE GALLERY
templates.ref: MDN @scope; Smashing Feb 2026; CSS-Tricks 2026 proximity portfolio

templates.whenToUse: A categorized portfolio or gallery where a card and its category container should change state together on hover/focus/tab with zero JS driving the visual logic.
templates.signature: CSS @scope proximity: hovering a card lets its inner scope win over the category outer scope and paint the card amber while the category container takes a blue :has() ring and siblings dim; at scroll=0 the top-left Motion card is pre-locked so the thumbnail shows the full cascade in one frame.

templates.title: KNOCKOUT VIDEO TYPE
templates.ref: CSS mask-image with inline SVG text (knockout-text-over-video); Codrops cutout-type creative 2026

templates.signature: Giant uppercase work-title glyphs are the only window: one live muted looping video plays inside the letterforms through a CSS mask-image (an inline SVG text data-URI on a plain DOM element, which survives GPU compositing where an SVG mask over foreignObject inverts on ANGLE); absolute #000 void fills everywhere else; mobile swaps the video for a hue-matched gradient through the same mask.

templates.title: CINEMATIC SCRUB
templates.ref: CSS scroll-driven animations view() timeline (Baseline 2024, Codrops 2026); Smashing 2026

templates.whenToUse: A single cinematic hero where one tall scroll authors a precise multi-beat reveal (headline tracking closing, image clip-path wipe, color grade, CTA rise) with literally zero JavaScript.
templates.signature: One tall ~500vh hero owns a single named view-timeline and four @keyframes scoped to scroll slices via animation-range scrub the whole composed shot to scroll position: letter-spacing closes, an image plate clip-path wipes in, an @property color-grade interpolates cold to hot, and the CTA rises last, all pure CSS; beat 1 is mid-play at scroll=0.

templates.title: NESTED MARQUEE MATRIX
templates.ref: marquee-of-marquees nested ticker (Awwwards experimental 2026); Godly 2026 kinetic-type marquee grids

templates.signature: A 2D ticker field at scroll=0: a 3x3 macro-grid (2x2 mobile) pans horizontally as one JS macro-marquee while each cell is an independent CSS inner marquee streaming thumbnails at its own randomized speed, with a live amber px/sec gauge and vermilion pause-seam gaps; click a frame to lock the pan and expand it.

templates.title: THE BOARD

templates.signature: A pure-CSS-3D mixing desk that is the gallery: each gold-capped fader is one work, pulling it up reveals that work in the CRT monitor bridge above; rotary knobs tone the monitor on drag, a green VU per channel breathes via a CSS custom property, the red ARM button plays a channel, the master fader scrubs the bank.

templates.title: ATMOSPHERE

templates.signature: A live ambient sky reacts to the visitor's real local weather: geolocation plus the Open-Meteo WMO code selects one of five full-viewport scenes (clear sun-ray SVG, Canvas rain curtain, storm with lightning + clouds, fog veil, star-field), with the media gallery glassed above; a sensible default scene paints instantly so scroll=0 is never blank.

templates.title: DATA LETTERFORMS
templates.ref: pudding.cool data-driven type; Creative Applications Network data-encoded letterforms

templates.whenToUse: Portfolios or catalogs where every item carries numeric metadata (cost, gen-time, tokens, seed) you want rendered as the typography itself rather than a separate data badge.
templates.signature: Every work's title is its own typeface: each letter is a live Canvas 2D Path2D whose stroke weight, letter width, and Catmull-Rom bezier jitter are computed from that work's generation metrics (gen-time, token count, seed), so no two titles share a hand; the first work's word fills the hero at scroll=0.

templates.title: PARTICLE SORT

templates.whenToUse: A generative-media corpus where each work is a particle cloud seeded from its own pixel luminance, and the signature interaction is clicking a sort key to physically spring the particles into a data-driven formation.
templates.signature: At scroll=0 a galaxy of 15 distinct luminous ice-green particle clouds (each seeded from a work's pixel luminance, additive Canvas 2D); clicking a sort key (date / color-temp / gen-time) fires a damped-spring sim that tints them amber and self-organizes the clouds into the sorted formation.

templates.title: BURST IN
templates.ref: @starting-style (Baseline 2025, MDN; Bramus CSS Day 2025); Codrops gallery entrances
templates.palette: archival paper #f9f6f0 + ink #111 + vermilion #c94a2e burst ring
templates.whenToUse: A work or media gallery where every card should detonate into place on load and re-detonate on each tag filter, the entire entrance living in CSS with no JS keyframes.
templates.signature: Every card's entrance start state (scale 0.6, opacity 0, blur 8px, 8deg tilt) is declared ONLY in CSS @starting-style, so the browser interpolates to the settled rule on first paint and on every filter re-insertion with zero JS keyframes; a vermilion burst ring snaps outward as each card lands.

templates.title: VORONOI FIELD
templates.ref: Godly 2026 generative gallery; CSS Design Awards generative-geometry 2026; d3-delaunay
templates.palette: void #0c0c10 + bone cell borders #f0ece4 + vermilion seed ring #c94a2e + amber expanded cell #e8c547
templates.whenToUse: A 6 to 12 work generative portfolio where mixed image/video pieces should tessellate one full-bleed canvas as a single field, and a click expands a cell to its full media, rather than a card grid.
templates.signature: A full-canvas Voronoi tessellation built from scratch with Fortune's sweep-line (no library), each cell clipping its own real media; hover highlights the nearest seed with a bone border and pulsing vermilion ring, and a click spring-pushes neighbor seeds outward so the chosen cell expands and plays the full work.

templates.title: OKLCH HUE-MIX GALLERY
templates.ref: CSS color-mix() in oklch (Baseline 2023); @property live theming (CSS-Tricks 2026); Argyle oklch 2026
templates.palette: hue-driven oklch dark theme: near-black hue-tinted ground + one live --hue (default 268 violet) computing accent/ink/line/glow via color-mix()
templates.whenToUse: A media or portfolio gallery where the entire palette (ground, accents, type tint, per-card borders and glow) is computed live in oklch from ONE --hue knob the visitor can spin, with perceptually-uniform steps.
templates.signature: A single registered @property --hue (number, inherits:true) drives the ENTIRE palette through color-mix() in oklch; a sticky conic hue wheel + spectrum slider + auto-spin shift --hue live and all media cards re-mix in lockstep, each fanning to its own hue offset.

templates.title: COMPOSITE ROOM
templates.ref: Codrops Blend Modes and Compositing 2025-2026; CSS Design Awards blend-mode portfolio 2026
templates.palette: bone base #f0ece4 + four work casts: multiply #c94a2e, screen #2c6fad, overlay #e8c547, difference #3ab8a8; ink #1a1714
templates.whenToUse: A portfolio of exactly four same-aspect works where a scroll-driven separation of a four-blend-mode composite (multiply, screen, overlay, difference) is the hero gesture.
templates.signature: Four full-viewport work layers stacked in exact 2D registration, each carrying a distinct CSS mix-blend-mode; at scroll=0 they fully overlap and their fused composite IS the hero, then staggered scroll slides them apart while still blended before settling into a labeled quad; mobile reuses the same engine.

templates.title: REACTION DIFFUSION
templates.ref: Codrops reaction-diffusion archive; Karl Sims Gray-Scott model; Creative Applications 2025-2026
templates.palette: abyss teal-black + saturated teal core + bright greens + thin amber reaction rim; amber work-card accent
templates.whenToUse: A portfolio or lab where each work is seeded into a single living two-chemical Gray-Scott field that grows organic teal and ice-green coral and labyrinth patterns around every piece.
templates.signature: A full-viewport live Gray-Scott two-chemical reaction-diffusion PDE (400x400 grid, 8 steps per rAF, JS color LUT, bilinear-upscaled Canvas 2D, no WebGL) runs as a living teal and ice-green background already mid-simulation with organic coral rings and labyrinth stripes at scroll=0; cards are seeded into the chemistry so the pattern grows around them.

templates.title: WAVEFRONT INDEX
templates.archetype: CSS Custom Highlight API keyword wave
templates.ref: CSS Custom Highlight API (Baseline 2024, MDN); Codrops Highlighting Text Ranges 2025
templates.palette: warm paper #faf7f2 + ink black + amber highlight #e8c547 + vermilion ring #c94a2e; Newsreader + Space Mono
templates.whenToUse: A pure-typographic work index where reading down the page lights up thematic keywords amber in a scroll-driven ripple, and clicking a keyword chip propagates that highlight across every entry at once, via native text-range annotation.
templates.signature: A single rAF loop reads scrollY and drives an amber wavefront down the viewport; as it crosses each keyword's text-range centroid the word ignites amber via CSS.highlights ::highlight(wave-amber), the crest intensifies, and clicking a keyword chip pins it across ALL paragraphs via ::highlight(pinned) on real Range objects (no DOM wrapping).

templates.title: GYRO GALLERY
templates.ref: DeviceOrientationEvent API (MDN); immersive tilt-to-pan spatial portfolio 2026
templates.palette: abyss black void + bone card faces + vermilion lock reticle + amber horizon ring
templates.whenToUse: A mobile-first spatial portfolio of 4 to 9 hero pieces where tilting the phone (cursor on desktop) pans a virtual camera across a hemisphere of works and the centered card dwell-locks.
templates.signature: A hemisphere of letterboxed work cards arranged in 3D depth around a fixed center vermilion reticle that dwell-locks the held card, with an amber horizon ring marking the dome base; tilt (gyroscope) or cursor pans the whole view via orthographic projection of precomputed spherical coordinates.

templates.title: LIQUID PAGE
templates.ref: Codrops Scroll-Revealed WebGL Gallery (2026); multi-page WebGL transition portfolio
templates.palette: void #070708 + ink #f4f1ea + per-world accents amber #e8b84b / cyan #00d4ff / coral #ff6b6b
templates.whenToUse: A portfolio or case-study SPA with 3 to 6 hero projects where moving between work routes should feel like crossing into a distinct color-keyed visual world via a cinematic shader transition.
templates.signature: One persistent Three.js canvas runs a noise-masked diagonal dissolve that sweeps the full viewport on every route change, melting the outgoing world's accent into the incoming one (amber to cyan to coral); each route is a distinct full-scene composition and the transition itself is the experience, with native History API routing.

templates.title: STROKE FIRST
templates.ref: MDN SVG paint-order:stroke fill (typographic poster); Codrops art-director SVG type 2025
templates.palette: bone stock #f4f0e6 + ink #111 fill + vermilion #c94a2e stroke; faint paper grain
templates.whenToUse: An art-direction or studio reel where each scroll panel is a full-bleed SVG poster whose giant display headline is outlined in a crisp vermilion stroke, with the work sitting behind the type.
templates.signature: Each panel is a full-viewport inline SVG poster whose giant display headline is a real selectable SVG text element with paint-order:stroke fill (the vermilion outline renders BEHIND the ink fill, expanding outward only so it never eats the counters) and a stroke scaled to the type so the halo reads at any size; a sticky-panel scroll zooms into the focal word, alternating solid and hollow posters.

templates.title: TIME SMEAR
templates.ref: Codrops + Coding Train slit-scan time-displacement; real-time slitscan tutorials
templates.palette: void #0b0b0d + bone HUD #f0ece4 + vermilion scan-edge #e8472a + cobalt past-frame tint #2c6fad
templates.whenToUse: A motion or AI-video reel that should read as a time-warped streak where each vertical column is a different instant, with a cursor-bent, click-to-freeze hero and no WebGL.
templates.signature: A 120-frame Canvas 2D ring buffer where output column x samples frame now-minus-x, smearing the clip's motion into a temporal ribbon with a vermilion scan-edge you drag to bend the slope; the buffer is pre-seeded so the streak shows at scroll=0.

templates.title: DUST FORM
templates.ref: Three.js Journey particles-morphing shader; Codrops particle image-formation
templates.palette: void #06060a + cool dust #e8f0ff + amber ignite #ff9f3f + bone label; the formed image supplies its colors
templates.whenToUse: A small curated portfolio (4 to 8 works) where one persistent GPU point-cloud assembles into each work's actual image and morphs A-to-B through an amber dust burst on scroll, arrow keys, or tap.
templates.signature: A persistent Three.js point-cloud (~30k points) positioned by sampling each work image's luminance, so the particles assemble into that work's silhouette; morphing lerps every point to the next image through an amber-ignited dust burst at the midpoint, then re-condenses; seeded fully formed at scroll=0.

templates.title: LIQUID MENU
templates.ref: Codrops Creative Gooey Effects; SVG metaball feGaussianBlur/feColorMatrix threshold
templates.palette: void #0d0d10 + bone #f0ece4 + vermilion active blob #c94a2e + teal merge-glow #3ab8a8
templates.whenToUse: A portfolio or work index that should feel like fusing liquid mercury rather than a card grid: thumbnails that drift, merge through a shared goo filter, and split apart, with full-bleed lightboxes on click.
templates.signature: 6 to 9 work thumbnails live inside circular blobs drifting through ONE shared SVG goo filter (feGaussianBlur then a feColorMatrix alpha threshold), so touching blobs fuse into a single liquid mass with a teal bridge then split; at rest a pair sits mid-fuse at scroll=0 so the metaball grammar is the thumbnail.

templates.title: INK BLEED INDEX
templates.ref: SVG feTurbulence/feDisplacementMap roughened type-frames; generative card ornament 2026
templates.palette: warm paper #f4f0e8 + ink #111 + vermilion #c0392b + amber #d4a84b; per-card wet-ink frames
templates.whenToUse: A clean typographic portfolio or catalogue where every card border should be a live, hand-inked generative frame at zero cost, with a guaranteed render in any browser.
templates.signature: Each card's border is an inline SVG stroked frame roughened by a per-card-seeded feTurbulence + feDisplacementMap filter into a wet hand-inked edge, so no two cards share a silhouette; bold vermilion/amber ink reads at scroll=0 while a Houdini paint(voronoi) flood is an optional hover enhancement.

templates.title: POLYGON MORPH
templates.ref: CSS clip-path:polygon() (Baseline); scroll-driven shape-morph (Codrops 2025-2026)
templates.palette: warm bone #f5f1eb + ink #111 + cobalt #2c6fad morph seam; per-work image supplies color
templates.whenToUse: A portfolio or gallery where each work should resolve from a jagged crop into a clean rectangle as it scrolls into view, responsive at any viewport width.
templates.signature: Each work plate is clipped by a 16-vertex clip-path:polygon() in PERCENT coords (so it scales to any viewport) that morphs from a jagged lightning-bolt to a clean rectangle via animation-timeline:view(); the first panel is frozen mid-morph at scroll=0 with the jagged notches biting into the image and a cobalt seam tracing them.

templates.title: LAUNCH DECK
templates.ref: Enerblock (Awwwards SOTD May 2026); Linear dark landing; Serve Robotics SOTD Jun 2026
templates.palette: void #0C0B11 + red #FF5949 + amber #E8C547 + bone #F4F1EB; pale pricing anchor inverts the dark shell
templates.whenToUse: A SaaS or product launch-and-conversion landing page where you need a real funnel (dark metric hero, feature bento, pale pricing anchor) rather than a media gallery.
templates.signature: Three live-counting stat widgets (active users, uptime %, requests served) in large amber monospace, seeded mid-increment and ramped to target via one shared rAF, fully visible at scroll=0 under an oversized red-accented headline + two CTAs on the void shell.

templates.title: SPEC TABLE
templates.ref: Vercel pricing; Linear pricing 2025; Stripe pricing; Levels.fyi (Awwwards SOTD 2025)
templates.palette: paper white + ink + steel-blue recommended #2c6fad + gold Most-Popular badge #E8C547 + lime CTA #C2F53E
templates.whenToUse: A pricing or feature-comparison page where the comparison table itself is the whole design object: Free/Pro/Enterprise headers, a sticky feature-label column, a recommended column, a monthly/annual morph, a FAQ accordion, a pinned CTA.
templates.signature: The entire page IS a premium three-column pricing/spec table treated as the design object: a tinted-blue lifted Pro card with a gold Most Popular badge, check/x marks that draw in via SVG stroke-dashoffset, and prices that morph through a CSS @property counter on the monthly/annual toggle.

templates.title: CHAIN OF THOUGHT
templates.ref: Anthropic extended-thinking UI 2026; Vercel v0 tool-call trace; Devin task trace; OpenAI o3 reasoning
templates.palette: deep navy #0f1117 + bone #f0ece4 + cyan tool-call #00d4ff + amber thinking-output #e8c547 + grey collapsed-step #3a3a4a
templates.whenToUse: When how a piece was produced (planning, tool calls, arguments, results) is as interesting as the output, revealing each work through a collapsible agentic reasoning trace that mimics modern AI reasoning UIs.
templates.signature: Grey collapsed plan/search step pills sit above an open cyan tool_call box (typed arguments + a green ok result) that resolves into the generated image inside a thin amber output border, with an amber thinking-time badge; later traces cascade-reveal on scroll.

templates.title: DATA STORY
templates.ref: The Pudding; NYT Upshot; Amelia Wattenberger; Domestic Data Streamers (Awwwards SOTD 2025)

templates.whenToUse: An explanatory data-journalism story where one chart in a sticky panel live-rewrites its geometry as the reader scrolls the prose, rather than a portfolio.
templates.signature: A sticky left panel holds ONE live SVG chart that rewrites its geometry as the right prose column scrolls: bar heights interpolate between per-step targets, exactly one bar held amber by the paragraph being read, the rest gaining blue saturation; the dual-pane data-journalism structure reads at scroll=0.

templates.title: CONFIGURATOR

templates.signature: The hero IS a live configurator at scroll=0: a product visual with a floating live total readout and a colour config badge, a 4-cell derived stat strip (total / kerb weight / lead time / options), and the full option ring beneath whose selection re-tints the product and rewrites the price.

templates.title: GLASS STACK BIO

templates.whenToUse: A phone-first creator hub or link-in-bio page: an oklch-ring avatar, display name, tagline, and 4 to 7 frosted-glass link tiles, each surfacing a hover URL-preview card.

templates.title: RECIPE METHOD

templates.whenToUse: Any sequential instructional content (recipe, tutorial, onboarding, assembly guide) where each step is a numbered full-width band with headline, detail, ingredient pills, and optional media, tracked by a sticky step rail.
templates.signature: Full-width horizontal step bands, each led by a large vermilion circled numeral and a Newsreader-italic instruction headline, tracked by a sticky left rail with a live step N of M count, a fill bar, and a clickable dot list; an IntersectionObserver fills the active band's numeral, tints the band, and plays only the single in-view video.

templates.title: EPOCH SPINE

templates.signature: A fixed full-height vertical spine whose era-banded rail (blue to amber) fills via clip-path and carries a glowing amber progress dot as you scroll; click any era node to jump to its full-width editorial panel; on mobile the spine rotates into a horizontal era-chip ticker.

templates.title: ONBOARD FLOW
templates.ref: Typeform visual form; Notion onboarding (SOTD); Linear onboarding (Godly 2026)

templates.signature: A full-viewport vertical form track that slides one step per screen on transform translateY, with a sticky five-dot SVG arc progress that fills amber per completed step; at scroll=0 the first screen shows a large Fraunces question headline, three lettered option buttons, and active dot 1.

templates.title: TOKEN STREAM
templates.ref: Anthropic extended-thinking UI 2026; Vercel v0 streaming; OpenAI streaming completions
templates.palette: near-black canvas #0a0a0c + bone settled type #f0ece4 + blinking red token cursor #e8472a + blue ghost-incomplete tint #2c6fad
templates.whenToUse: When you want the gallery itself to read as an in-progress LLM streaming response, with incompleteness as the brand, rather than a finished grid; ideal for an AI/media-gen showcase.
templates.signature: The gallery is one live LLM response streaming in real time: completed works collapse into a dense streamed-history log while the live edge expands, the in-progress paragraph types token by token with a ghost-incomplete tail fading in tinted blue and a blinking red cursor, and its image stays blurred until generation completes.

templates.title: COMMAND-K PORTFOLIO

templates.palette: void near-black #0f0f12 + bone #f0ece4 + cobalt #3a7bd5 active highlight + amber #e8c547 shortcut badges; JetBrains Mono + Inter
templates.whenToUse: A developer or studio portfolio where navigation IS the interface: a flat catalog of 5-40 works you filter, arrow through, and Enter like a Linear/Raycast command menu instead of scrolling.
templates.signature: A functional command palette IS the navigation: a centered glass modal opens on load (and on Cmd+K or /) over a dim full-viewport typographic index; typing filters in real time, arrow keys move the cobalt active highlight, Enter zooms the selected work to a letterboxed full-screen viewer, with amber shortcut badges per row and the whole mechanic readable at scroll=0.

templates.signature: An oversized LATEST release spotlight at scroll=0: a lime-pulsing v2.7.0 SemVer badge with Feature/Fix/Breaking pills above a CSS-only syntax-highlighted add/remove diff block, fed by a sticky year/month rail (desktop) that collapses to a horizontally-scrolling date-pill header on mobile.

templates.title: APERTURE API REFERENCE

templates.title: VOXEL ATELIER
templates.ref: isometric CSS pixel/voxel art; voxel dioramas; Monument-Valley-style stacked scenes built with CSS 3D transforms
